title: Double free or corruption error during n8n execution
symptom: When executing `npm exec n8n`, the process crashes with a 'double free or corruption (out)' error. This occurs after updating to Android version 15.
applies_when: Running on Linux Ubuntu 24.04 with Termux
not_this_if: Error does not occur after reinstalling Node.js
root_cause: The 'double free or corruption' error typically indicates a memory management issue within Node.js, which can arise from incompatibilities or corruption in the Node.js installation, especially after system updates.
agent_instruction: Uninstall and then reinstall Node.js to resolve the error.
